creator: Adam C. Curry (Crackpot) and John C. Dvorak (Buzzkill)
description: ATTN: You have landed on page two of the  "NO AGENDA SHOW"  Archive.  -- Main Page: 001-700 Internet Archive of the  "NO AGENDA SHOW" with Adam C. Curry and John C. Dvorak . Also known as "THE BEST PODCAST IN THE UNIVERSE!" (Award Pending). Each week Adam and John discuss, dissect, deconstruct and sometimes poke fun at current news stories from mainstream media. The majority of the  "NO AGENDA SHOW" 's content comes from news mainstream media is afraid to cover or refuses to cover. Come join the Hosts, Listeners and Producers every Sunday and Thursday, LIVE at 9am PT. (A.K.A. "TBPITU" ) Donations always welcome! Donation page or Dvorak.org/NA Sign Up for the newsletter. Thank you for your courage and support!
